name: console-setup-linux
title: console-setup-linux
description:
Linux specific part of console-setup
This package includes fonts in psf format and definitions of various
8-bit charmaps.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use console-setup-linux because Linux specific part of console-setup.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use console-setup-linux as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair console-setup-linux with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `console-setup-linux --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
